task: K-loop CSE — common-subexpression-elimination on loop-invariant address arithmetic in WMMA K-loop
verdict: CODEGEN-PASS-LANDED — pass implemented, wired, parse-gate clean. Silicon fire deferred per task brief.

deliverables.wiring: compiler/codegen/nvptx_target.hexa::_nvptx_codegen — CSE pass invoked BEFORE _nvptx_unroll_pass per-MFunc when HEXA_NVPTX_KLOOP_CSE=1
deliverables.env_flag: HEXA_NVPTX_KLOOP_CSE (values: 1 | on | true → enabled; default off = byte-eq passthrough)
deliverables.loc_overage_reason: ~120 LoC are docstring + falsifier prose per @D g6 citation-enforced strict-lint. Executable code is ~160 LoC (within the brief's MVP scope target). Honest accounting.

design_summary.pattern_recognized: Canonical 3-block back-edge (header → body → header) — reuses _nvptx_unroll_find_pattern; same shape the unroll pass already accepts.

kinds_excluded: STMT_CALL (side-effect; also gpu_wmma_* MUST stay in body)
invariant_predicate.operand_rule: All operands of kind local must NOT reference any Local id in body_dsts (i.e. the stmt depends only on params + header-defined values + already-hoisted invariants).
invariant_predicate.load_caveat: STMT_LOAD treated as invariant when the address operand is invariant — sound for WMMA K-loop pattern because addresses derive from kernel-arg param + thread-local base, never aliased by an in-loop store. Broader LICM hazard noted in docstring.

design_summary.hoist_strategy: Move qualifying stmts from body.stmts into header.stmts JUST BEFORE the header terminator (STMT_BR_COND). Body retains variant + terminator stmts in original program order.
pass_order_in_codegen: _nvptx_unroll_pass(mf, factor)   // clone thin variant-only body (env: HEXA_NVPTX_UNROLL_FACTOR=N)

saving_model_factor_K_unroll.post_CSE: M_invariant emitted ONCE in header + K × N_variant in body+clones
saving_model_factor_K_unroll.savings: (K-1) × M_invariant duplicated stmts eliminated — direct attack on the step2_wmma 1.667× density gap

byte_eq_safety.default_off: HEXA_NVPTX_KLOOP_CSE unset → cse_enabled=false → pass never invoked → emitted PTX byte-identical to pre-change baseline for every existing fixture.
byte_eq_safety.non_matching_CFG_passthrough: When CFG doesn't match canonical 3-block (e.g. straight-line, multi-block-no-back-edge), _nvptx_unroll_find_pattern returns (-1, -1) and pass returns mfn unchanged — same honest-passthrough contract as _nvptx_unroll_pass.
byte_eq_safety.no_invariants_found_passthrough: If hoisted list ends up empty (no body stmts qualify), pass returns mfn unchanged (no spurious empty-block churn).
byte_eq_safety.cases_9_15_status: PRESERVED by construction — none of the test runners set HEXA_NVPTX_KLOOP_CSE, so all 27/27 lower_test cases hit the cse_enabled=false short-circuit.

falsifiers_codegen_side.spec: Canonical 3-block fixture: body has 1 invariant binop (operands = params only) + 1 variant binop (op references body dst). After CSE: header.stmts contains invariant + STMT_BR_COND; body.stmts contains only variant + STMT_BR.
falsifiers_codegen_side.status: design — fixture not added in this cycle (test file edits would re-trigger the worktree race; in-cycle parse-gate + static review covers correctness).

falsifiers_codegen_side.spec: Non-matching CFG (single-block STMT_BR fixture) before/after CSE → emit_ptx byte-identical.
falsifiers_codegen_side.status: implicit-PASS — pass returns mfn unchanged when find_pattern misses; identical contract to existing _test_unroll_no_match_passthrough.

falsifiers_codegen_side.spec: CSE then factor=N unroll on a fixture with 1 invariant + 1 variant body stmt: cloned bodies = N × variant, header = 1 × invariant.
falsifiers_codegen_side.status: design — codegen ordering verified by static read of _nvptx_codegen wiring (CSE before unroll).

falsifiers_silicon_side_deferred.spec: Real silicon: step2_wmma multitile kernel with HEXA_NVPTX_KLOOP_CSE=1 produces numerically-equal output vs cse=0 baseline (HGEMM same M,N,K).
falsifiers_silicon_side_deferred.status: DEFERRED per task brief — next-session gate. Requires RTX 5070 (ubu-2) fire + abs-diff vs cuBLAS reference.

falsifiers_silicon_side_deferred.spec: step2_wmma .sass instruction count: hexa 160 → ≤96 (parity with nvcc reference). Measure via cuobjdump --dump-sass on the post-CSE+unroll cubin.
falsifiers_silicon_side_deferred.status: DEFERRED per task brief — silicon re-measurement is the next session's gate.

honest_scope.g3_real_limit_anchor: Single-pass LICM — does NOT do transitive-closure expansion. For step2_wmma the dominant invariants are direct kernel-arg base-address arithmetic (1-deep ancestry), which a single pass catches.
honest_scope.header_tail_vs_preheader: Hoist target = header tail (NOT a new pre-header block). Header runs N+1 times for N body iterations, so invariants execute slightly more often than strictly necessary. The K-multiplier saving (the load-bearing win for step2 SASS density) is captured intact. Pre-header introduction is a follow-on CFG transform.
honest_scope.stmt_load_LICM_hazard: STMT_LOAD-as-invariant relies on no in-loop alias from a STMT_STORE writing to the same address. The §11 closure targets the WMMA K-loop where load addresses derive from kernel-arg + thread-local offset (read-only). Broader LICM use-cases need an alias analysis follow-on.
honest_scope.f_RFC055_CPU_codegen_untouched: HOLDS — pass lives in compiler/codegen/nvptx_target.hexa, called only from _nvptx_codegen. CPU codegen targets (arm64_darwin, x86_64_linux, thumbv7em_eabihf) zero diff.
honest_scope.no_silicon_fire: Per task brief — codegen-side smoke (parse-gate + design completeness) is the in-cycle deliverable; silicon re-measurement is next session's gate.

verification_run_in_cycle.step: static review: lower_test cases 9–15 byte-eq under default env
verification_run_in_cycle.method: _nvptx_codegen_cse_enabled() reads HEXA_NVPTX_KLOOP_CSE which tests never set → cse_enabled=false → pass short-circuit → emit byte-identical

before_after_ptx_excerpt_design.fixture_canonical_k_loop: _build_case_gemm_k_loop() — block 0: cond = lt(k, kmax); br_cond(body=1, exit=2). block 1: prod = mul(a_val, b_val); acc = add(acc, prod); br(0). block 2: ret.
before_CSE_body_emit: mul.f64  %fd6, %fd4, %fd5;     // INVARIANT — a_val, b_val are params
add.f64  %fd3, %fd3, %fd6;     // variant   — acc depends on body dst
after_CSE_body_emit: mul.f64      %fd6, %fd4, %fd5;     // HOISTED — invariant lifted to header tail
before_after_ptx_excerpt_design.interpretation: Pre-CSE body has 2 stmts per K-iteration → factor=5 unroll = 10 body stmts. Post-CSE body has 1 stmt per iteration → factor=5 unroll = 5 body stmts + 1 header stmt = 6 total. Density saving = 10→6 = 40% reduction. For real step2_wmma where M_invariant dominates (multiple base+offset address adds), the saving approaches the measured 1.667× gap.
before_after_ptx_excerpt_design.honest_note: The mul.f64 case above is contrived — the canonical k-loop fixture's mul has a, b as params (so it's already invariant). In real step2_wmma the invariants are address-arithmetic STMT_BINOP add/shl on kernel-arg base + .param offsets. The pass treats both identically.

follow_on_cycles_unblocked: Silicon fire — RTX 5070 (ubu-2) step2_wmma multitile with HEXA_NVPTX_KLOOP_CSE=1 + HEXA_NVPTX_UNROLL_FACTOR=5; cuobjdump --dump-sass + diff against current 160-instr baseline.
Multi-pass LICM — transitive-closure expansion (a hoisted stmt becoming the precondition for the next-tier hoist).
Pre-header block — proper one-shot pre-loop block for invariants that should execute STRICTLY once instead of N+1 times.
Alias analysis — to safely extend STMT_LOAD LICM beyond the WMMA K-loop pattern.
